title: Dimension Date Lock
description: A small plugin which allows admins to lock the vanilla dimensions until a specific day and hour has passed.
body:
# About
This is a small plugin orginally developed for a private Minecraft Server. The only thing this plugin does is giving the Administrators the ability to lock either the End or the Nether until a specific date and time (example: 15.01.2025 18:00) has passed. Until then, when a player tries to enter the locked dimension, they will be met with a message telling them the dimension is locked and until when this is the case.

# Usage:
-   **/setdimensiondate <nether|end> <dd-MM-yyyy HH:mm>**
